item.description: President Trump says the U.S. will start escorting ships through the Strait of Hormuz on Monday, after he didn’t rule out a return to fighting with Iran. The president also told an Israeli media outlet that Iran’s latest peace offer was “not acceptable.” NBC News’ Raf Sanchez has the latest.

media:content.media:title: Trump says the U.S. will ‘free up’ ships in the Strait of Hormuz
media:content.media:description: President Trump says the U.S. will start escorting ships through the Strait of Hormuz on Monday, after he didn’t rule out a return to fighting with Iran. The president also told an Israeli media outlet that Iran’s latest peace offer was “not acceptable.” NBC News’ Raf Sanchez has the latest.

item.title: Trump says the U.S. will ‘free up’ ships in the Strait of Hormuz

item.dc:creator: Raquel Coronell Uribe
item.description: Rudy Giuliani has been hospitalized and is in critical condition, according to his spokesperson, Ted Goodman.“Mayor Rudy Giuliani is currently in the hospital, where he remains in critical but stable condition.

media:content.media:text: Rudy Giuliani, seated with a chest brace on under a blue suit coat.
media:content.media:description: The spokesman did not specify why the former New York City mayor, who is 81, had been hospitalized, or which hospital admitted him.

item.title: Rudy Giuliani in 'critical' condition in hospital, spokesman says

item.dc:creator: Dennis Romero
Andrew Jones
Isabella Colletta
item.description: Three passengers have died and three other people are being treated amid a "public health event" involving suspected hantavirus infections on a cruise ship in the Atlantic Ocean, health officials said

media:content.media:text: A blue and white cruise ship floats in calm waters under a clear blue sky.
media:content.media:description: The cruise ship MV Hondius, stationary off the port of Praia, the capital of Cape Verde, on May 3, 2026. An outbreak of "severe acute respiratory illness" on board a cruise ship in the Atlantic has left two people dead and a third in intensive care in Johannesburg, South Africa's health ministry told AFP on May 3, 2025.

item.title: Suspected hantavirus infections leave 3 dead, several ill on a cruise ship in the Atlantic

item.dc:creator: Angela Yang
item.description: What some viewers thought was an AI-generated meme in “The Devil Wears Prada 2” was actually drawn by a human artist

media:content.media:text: Meryl Streep clasps her hands while seated at a table wearing a suitcoat and black eyeglasses.
media:content.media:description: Meryl Streep in a scene from The Devil Wears Prada 2, released in 2026.

item.title: A 'Devil Wears Prada 2' meme that viewers thought was AI slop was actually made by a human

item.dc:creator: Dareh Gregorian
Megan Shannon
item.description: The Trump administration has made an aggressive push to add the president's name to buildings, battleships, money and government websites.

media:content.media:text: Donald Trump.
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump is physically leaving his mark on Washington and beyond, more so than any other president in modern U.S. history.

media:content.media:text: DONALD J. TRUMP etched into a wet stone facade, with snow covering the grass beneath it.
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump is physically leaving his mark on Washington and beyond, more so than any other president in modern U.S. history.

media:content.media:text: Workers in two hydraulic cranes are suspended above the ground in front of the Kennedy Center's facade, with a giant purple tarp stretched behind them.
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump is physically leaving his mark on Washington and beyond, more so than any other president in modern U.S. history.

media:content.media:text: Donald Trump stands next to a signboard with an image of a battleship inside a room at Mar-a-Lago.
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump is physically leaving his mark on Washington and beyond, more so than any other president in modern U.S. history.

media:content.media:text: Donald Trump.
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump is physically leaving his mark on Washington and beyond, more so than any other president in modern U.S. history.

media:content.media:text: Designs for semiquincentennial gold coins featuring Trump.
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump is physically leaving his mark on Washington and beyond, more so than any other president in modern U.S. history.

media:content.media:text: A 50 dollar bill poking up from a seat pocket in President Trump's pants as he ascends the stairs to Air Force One.
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump is physically leaving his mark on Washington and beyond, more so than any other president in modern U.S. history.

media:content.media:text: The State Department will be releasing a limited series of U.S. passports featuring the image of President Trump, a State Department official said
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump is physically leaving his mark on Washington and beyond, more so than any other president in modern U.S. history.

media:content.media:text: Image: Workers install a new banner featuring an image of President Donald Trump on the facade of the U.S. Department of Justice
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump is physically leaving his mark on Washington and beyond, more so than any other president in modern U.S. history.

media:content.media:text: President Donald Trump speaks at at a "Trump Accounts" event on Jan. 28, 2026.
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump is physically leaving his mark on Washington and beyond, more so than any other president in modern U.S. history.

media:content.media:text: President Trump Announces TrumpRx From The White House
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump is physically leaving his mark on Washington and beyond, more so than any other president in modern U.S. history.

item.title: 12 places Trump's name or image is being added by the federal government

item.description: Abortion pill maker asks to restore mail access

media:content.media:title: Abortion pill maker asks to restore mail access
media:content.media:description: Abortion pill maker asks to restore mail access

item.title: Abortion pill maker asks to restore mail access

item.description: Democratic Sen. Adam Schiff of California says that while multiple presidents have not gone to Congress for war authorization in the past, President Trump’s actions are a “clear violation” of the War Powers Act of 1973.

media:content.media:title: Senator says Trump's actions violates war powers law
media:content.media:description: Democratic Sen. Adam Schiff of California says that while multiple presidents have not gone to Congress for war authorization in the past, President Trump’s actions are a “clear violation” of the War Powers Act of 1973.

item.title: Senator says Trump's actions violates war powers law

item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche reacts to President Trump saying he doesn't use the word "war" when referring to the U.S. conflict with Iran.

media:content.media:title: DOJ chief says U.S. not actively at war with Iran
media:content.media:description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche reacts to President Trump saying he doesn't use the word "war" when referring to the U.S. conflict with Iran.

item.title: DOJ chief says U.S. not actively at war with Iran

item.description: Surveillance video shows a driver crashing through the front doors of the Portland Athletic Club before the vehicle erupted into flames.

media:content.media:title: Driver crashes through Portland club
media:content.media:description: Surveillance video shows a driver crashing through the front doors of the Portland Athletic Club before the vehicle erupted into flames.

item.title: Driver crashes through Portland club

item.description: A mom’s viral plea brought thousands together to a city in Idaho to make one little boy’s birthday unforgettable.

media:content.media:title: Thousands make little boy's birthday unforgettable
media:content.media:description: A mom’s viral plea brought thousands together to a city in Idaho to make one little boy’s birthday unforgettable.

item.title: Thousands make little boy's birthday unforgettable

item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche tells “Meet the Press” that the indictment of former FBI Director James Comey “is not just about a single Instagram post” and investigators have been collecting evidence for nearly a year.

media:content.media:title: Acting AG Blanche says Comey indictment ‘not just about’ one post
media:content.media:description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche tells “Meet the Press” that the indictment of former FBI Director James Comey “is not just about a single Instagram post” and investigators have been collecting evidence for nearly a year.

item.title: Acting AG Blanche says Comey indictment ‘not just about’ one post

media:content.media:description: First horse trained by a woman wins at Kentucky Derby

item.title: First horse trained by a woman wins at Kentucky Derby

item.description: Aziz Ansari debuts as FBI Director Kash Patel on 'SNL'

media:content.media:title: Aziz Ansari debuts as FBI Director Kash Patel on 'SNL'
media:content.media:description: Aziz Ansari debuts as FBI Director Kash Patel on 'SNL'

item.title: Aziz Ansari debuts as FBI Director Kash Patel on 'SNL'

item.description: Trump says there is possibility U.S. could strike Iran again

media:content.media:title: Trump says there is possibility U.S. could strike Iran again
media:content.media:description: Trump says there is possibility U.S. could strike Iran again

item.title: Trump says there is possibility U.S. could strike Iran again

item.description: As album rollouts continue to evolve, fans recently attempted to melt a giant ice block in the middle of Toronto as part of Drake's "Iceman" announcement. But how did we get here? NBC News' Gadi Schwartz takes a look back at other memorable rollouts, and how they have advanced through the years.

media:content.media:title: The evolution of album rollouts
media:content.media:description: As album rollouts continue to evolve, fans recently attempted to melt a giant ice block in the middle of Toronto as part of Drake's "Iceman" announcement. But how did we get here? NBC News' Gadi Schwartz takes a look back at other memorable rollouts, and how they have advanced through the years.

item.title: The evolution of album rollouts

item.dc:creator: Natasha Korecki
item.description: The massive grassroots movement that twice rallied behind Bernie Sanders' presidential bids is facing a big question: Who will emerge as its next leader?

media:content.media:text: A split composite image of Ro Khanna, left, Bernie Sanders, and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
media:content.media:description: Rep. Ro Khanna, D-Calif.; Sen. Bernie Sanders, I-Vt.; Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, D-N.Y.

item.title: Who will own the Bernie Sanders lane in 2028?

item.dc:creator: Amina Kilpatrick
item.description: As celebrities prepare to hit the 2026 Met Gala red carpet, learn more about the "costume art" theme, who's coming, what time it starts and more.

media:content.media:text: The MET Gala 2025 - New York
media:content.media:description: Diana Ross attending the Metropolitan Museum of Art Costume Institute Benefit Gala 2025 in New York, in 2025.

item.title: Your complete guide to the 2026 Met Gala

item.dc:creator: Yuliya Talmazan
item.description: Iran warned the United States on Monday not to approach or enter the Strait of Hormuz as the American military launches a new effort to “guide” stranded ships through the critical waterway

media:content.media:text: Ships and boats in the Strait of Hormuz, Musandam
media:content.media:description: Ships and boats in the Strait of Hormuz near Musandam, Oman, on May 1, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Vehicles drive past a billboard with graphic showing Strait of Hormuz and sewn lips of President Trump in Tehran, Iran on May 2, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Vehicles pass a billboard in Tehran on Saturday which appears to show the sewn lips of Trump covered in a ribbon shaped to represent the Strait of Hormuz.

media:content.media:text: India Tanker Desh Garima Unloads Crude Amid Hormuz Supply Disruptions
media:content.media:description: India-flagged tanker Desh Garima unloads crude oil in Mumbai after transiting the Strait of Hormuz on April 30.

item.title: Iran threatens to attack U.S. forces in Strait of Hormuz after Trump launches mission to guide ships

item.dc:creator: Patrick Smith
Madison Lambert
item.description: At least 12 people were hospitalized after gunfire broke out during a party at a campground in Oklahoma on Sunday night, local officials said

media:content.media:text: Oklahoma Party Shooting
media:content.media:description: Police block off a road in Edmond, Okla., after a campground shooting at Lake Arcadia on Sunday.

item.title: At least 12 hospitalized as gunfire rings out at Oklahoma campground party

item.dc:creator: Evan Bush
item.description: The virus that is believed to be responsible for the deaths of three people and the illnesses of three others aboard a cruise ship over the weekend is a relatively rare but devastating threat without a vaccine, treatment or cure.

media:content.media:text: A sheet of paper with an illustration of a deer mouse and words reading HANTAVIRUS CAUTION.
media:content.media:description: Signage at Yosemite National Park, where four people staying in the Curry Village tent cabins were infected with the hantavirus before two of them died from illness in 2012.

media:content.media:text: A blue and white cruise ship floats in calm waters under a clear blue sky.
media:content.media:description: Signage at Yosemite National Park, where four people staying in the Curry Village tent cabins were infected with the hantavirus before two of them died from illness in 2012.

media:content.media:text: Sin Nombre Virus
media:content.media:description: Signage at Yosemite National Park, where four people staying in the Curry Village tent cabins were infected with the hantavirus before two of them died from illness in 2012.

media:content.media:text: A small brown mouse on the ground.
media:content.media:description: Signage at Yosemite National Park, where four people staying in the Curry Village tent cabins were infected with the hantavirus before two of them died from illness in 2012.

item.title: What to know about hantavirus

item.dc:creator: Macy Jenkins, NBC Los Angeles
item.description: SAG-AFTRA reached a tentative agreement with the Alliance of Motion Picture and Television Producers studios on Saturday, avoiding a repeat of the strikes from three years ago.

media:content.media:text: The back side of the HOLLYWOOD sign in Los Angeles stands in front of the city skyline at dusk.
media:content.media:description: The Hollywood sign in Los Angeles during SAG-AFTRA's strike against Hollywood studios in 2023.

item.title: SAG-AFTRA reaches tentative deal with major studios

item.dc:creator: Joe Kottke
Jay Blackman
Emma Caughlan
item.description: A United Airlines plane hit a light pole during its final approach to Newark Liberty International Airport, injuring a driver on the New Jersey Turnpike and causing damage to the aircraft, officials said Sunday

media:content.media:text: Four United Airlines jets sit on a tarmac with the New York City skyline visible in the distance.
media:content.media:description: United Airlines planes at Newark Liberty International Airport last year.

item.title: Driver on N.J. Turnpike hurt as United plane hits pole on approach to Newark airport
